title: Pungent Peppery Croatian Shrimp Skewers
description: A romantic Croatian dish featuring succulent shrimp, tomato ketchup, and a deglaze fond, perfect for a special occasion. This recipe is sure to impress with its briny and bouncy texture.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Thread the shrimp onto skewers, leaving a small space between each shrimp.
In a small bowl, whisk together the tomato ketchup, olive oil, garlic, black pepper, paprika, and salt.
Brush the mixture onto both sides of the shrimp.
Grill the shrimp for 2-3 minutes per side, or until they are pink and cooked through.
While the shrimp are cooking, heat a small saucepan over medium heat and add the lemon juice.
Scrape up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan to create a deglaze fond.
Serve the shrimp hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley and a drizzle of the deglaze fond.
Offer additional tomato ketchup on the side for dipping.
